query: SELECT id, ticker, transactionDate, shares, pricePerShare, currency, totalAmount, fxRate, totalAmountCHF, fees FROM portfolioTransactions WHERE ticker = 'MONC.MI' ORDER BY transactionDate DESC LIMIT 5
